creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
booted a fresh FreeBSD produced image:

FreeBSD freebsd 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #0 main-n261233-005cca8361a4: Thu Mar  2 08:07:29 UTC 2023     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64


and this is still happening, so I don't think it's down to my build, or that it's got anything to do with kernel/userland mismatch.
